atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports persistent left shoulder pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports left shoulder pain exacerbated by overhead activities

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports left shoulder pain exacerbated by lying on the affected shoulder

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes the pain as constant

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes the pain as worsening with pressure

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is taking two extra-strength Tylenol tablets every six to eight hours

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies numbness or tingling in his arms or hands

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has no prior shoulder pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals limited active and passive range of motion in the left shoulder

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals tenderness to palpation of the greater tuberosity

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Capillary refill is less than three seconds in the left hand

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The x-ray of the left shoulder shows no fractures

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician is ordering an MRI of the left shoulder

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician is referring the patient to physical therapy
